title: Conduct Post-Mortem Debugging
description: Generate Core Dumps from failing Node.js processes in production. Analyze Core Dumps using `llnode` to inspect process state, stack, and heap at the moment of failure. Conduct thorough post-mortem debugging to diagnose intermittent crashes and memory corruption issues.
objectives: Generate Core Dumps from failing Node.js processes in production.
Analyze Core Dumps using `llnode` to inspect process state, stack, and heap at the moment of failure.
Conduct thorough post-mortem debugging to diagnose intermittent crashes and memory corruption issues.
